scope: Human health effects and bioaccumulation of microplastics; nano-range particles in human tissues
key_metrics_output: Tissue concentration estimates; bioaccumulation factors; organ clearance rates
abstract: Tiny plastic particles are being found everywhere, including in the human brain. But it is not yet clear which findings can be trusted and what they might mean.

key_metrics_output: Tissue concentration estimates; bioaccumulation factors; organ clearance rates (PBK model)
